## ScreenShotPP v0.1.3

This release cleans up the default filename for saved screenshots.

### Highlights

- Saved captures are now named like `Screenshot_2026-06-04_202513.png` — English, underscores, and a timestamp down to the second
- The seconds in the name prevent multiple captures taken in the same minute from overwriting each other

### macOS

Download the `.dmg`, drag ScreenShotPP into `Applications`, then grant Screen Recording
permission on first launch.

### Windows preview

Download and run the NSIS `.exe` installer. The Windows installer is not code-signed yet,
so Microsoft SmartScreen may display a warning. Verify that your download comes from this
GitHub repository, then choose **More info** → **Run anyway**.
